sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5884" key="a)mfikne/fallos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφικνέφαλλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5884.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with cushions at both ends,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀμφικέφαλος</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0551.tlg017.perseus-grc1:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
